exercises.title: Initialize Repo
exercises.description: Write the command to initialize a new Git repository.
exercises.solutionCode:
# The hint provides the solution:
# git init

exercises.title: Stage Files
exercises.description: Write the command to stage all files for commit.
exercises.solutionCode:
# The hint provides the solution:
# git add . or git add -A

exercises.title: Commit
exercises.description: Write the command to commit with message "Initial commit".
exercises.solutionCode:
# The hint provides the solution:
# git commit -m "Initial commit"

exercises.title: Check Status
exercises.description: Write the command to check the status of your repo.
exercises.solutionCode:
# The hint provides the solution:
# git status

exercises.title: View Log
exercises.description: Write the command to view commit history.
exercises.solutionCode:
# The hint provides the solution:
# git log or git log --oneline

exercises.title: Create Branch
exercises.description: Write the command to create a new branch called feature.
exercises.hint: git branch feature or git checkout -b feature
exercises.solutionCode:
# The hint provides the solution:
# git branch feature or git checkout -b feature

exercises.title: Merge Branch
exercises.description: Write the command to merge the feature branch into current branch.
exercises.solutionCode:
# The hint provides the solution:
# git merge feature

exercises.title: Clone Repo
exercises.description: Write the command to clone a repository from a URL.
exercises.solutionCode:
# The hint provides the solution:
# git clone https://github.com/user/repo.git

exercises.title: Push Changes
exercises.description: Write the command to push to the main branch on origin.
exercises.solutionCode:
# The hint provides the solution:
# git push origin main

exercises.title: Pull Changes
exercises.description: Write the command to pull latest changes from remote.
exercises.solutionCode:
# The hint provides the solution:
# git pull origin main
